description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring two main structures with flat and slightly sloped roofs, surrounded by landscaped greenery and decorative trees. The property includes a large, organically shaped swimming pool with a paved deck area and a circular hot tub adjacent to it. The front of the house is defined by a wide driveway and a central walkway leading to the main entrances, flanked by manicured lawns and ornamental plants. The buildings have large windows and clean, geometric lines, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The backyard is spacious, with the pool as the focal point and additional green space for recreation or relaxation. The overall layout is symmetrical, with the pool and garden areas providing a luxurious and inviting atmosphere.
description: A modern, two-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a spacious pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrances, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, hot tub, and the rear garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, hot tub, and backyard greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, garden, and the side facades of the buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central walkway with double doors, minimal steps, no porch, and clean geometric lines
